title: polyscias suborbicularis
intro: Polyscias suborbicularis, also known as the Māori potato or kōuka, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to the presence of saponins, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits associated with Polyscias suborbicularis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
